Now I need to understand the goal. Looking at the top-left panel, it shows white on top and purple on bottom. The central area has a purple rectangle (in a gray frame) and below it a partially-filled rectangle (top half purple, bottom half white).

2. Or fill the rectangle completely with purple

- Or change colors to match the pattern?
